Name: LOOK_AT_SPINE_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters relating to look-at cameras for various joints.

Fields.Name: Look-At %: Root
Fields.Description: The look-at rate towards the Root joint.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Look-At %: Hip
Fields.Description: The horizontal look-at rate towards the Hip (spine) joint.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Look-At %: Shoulder
Fields.Description: The horizontal look-at rate towards the Shoulder (clavicle) joint.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Look-At %: Wrist
Fields.Description: The horizontal look-at rate towards the Wrist (hand) joint.

Fields.Name: Vertical Look-At %: Hip
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Hip (spine) joint.

Fields.Name: Vertical Look-At %: Shoulder
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Shoulder (clavicle) joint.

Fields.Name: Vertical Look-At %: Wrist
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Wrist (hand) joint.

Fields.Name: Limit Angle: Hip (Left)
Fields.Description: The limit angle for the Hip (spine) joint when facing left.

Fields.Name: Limit Angle: Hip (Right)
Fields.Description: The limit angle for the Hip (spine) joint when facing right.

Fields.Name: Limit Angle: Hip (Up)
Fields.Description: The limit angle for the Hip (spine) joint when facing up.

Fields.Name: Limit Angle: Hip (Down)
Fields.Description: The limit angle for the Hip (spine) joint when facing down.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Look-At %: Lower Back
Fields.Description: The horizontal look-at rate towards the Lower Back (SpineA) joint.

Fields.Name: Vertical Look-At %: Lower Back
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Lower Back (SpineA) joint.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Limit Angle: Root (Up)
Fields.Description: The limit angle for the body whilst in flight when facing up.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Limit Angle: Root (Down)
Fields.Description: The limit angle for the body whilst in flight when facing down.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Vertical Look-At %: Root
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Root joint whilst in flight.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Vertical Look-At %: Hip
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Hip (spine) joint whilst in flight.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Vertical Look-At %: Lower Back
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Lower Back (SpineA) joint whilst in flight.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Vertical Look-At %: Shoulder
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Shoulder (clavicle) joint whilst in flight.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Vertical Look-At %: Wrist
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Wrist (hand) joint whilst in flight.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Look-At %: Lower Back [EX_A]
Fields.Description: The horizontal look-at rate towards the Lower Back (SpineA_EX_A) joint.

Fields.Name: Vertical Look-At %: Lower Back [EX_A]
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Lower Back (SpineA_EX_A) joint.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Vertical Look-At %: Lower Back [EX_A]
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Lower Back (SpineA_EX_A) joint whilst in flight.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Look-At %: Lower Back [EX_B]
Fields.Description: The horizontal look-at rate towards the Lower Back (SpineA_EX_B) joint.

Fields.Name: Vertical Look-At %: Lower Back [EX_B]
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Lower Back (SpineA_EX_B) joint.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Vertical Look-At %: Lower Back [EX_B]
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Lower Back (SpineA_EX_B) joint whilst in flight.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Look-At %: Pelvis
Fields.Description: The horizontal look-at rate towards the Pelvis joint.

Fields.Name: Vertical Look-At %: Pelvis
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Pelvis joint.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Vertical Look-At %: Pelvis
Fields.Description: The vertical look-at rate towards the Pelvis joint whilst in flight.

Fields.Name: Lower Vertical Look-At %: Hip
Fields.Description: The lower vertical look-at rate for this joint.

Fields.Name: Lower Vertical Look-At %: Shoulder
Fields.Description: The lower vertical look-at rate for this joint.

Fields.Name: Lower Vertical Look-At %: Wrist
Fields.Description: The lower vertical look-at rate for this joint.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Lower Vertical Look-At %: Root
Fields.Description: The lower vertical look-at rate for this joint.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Lower Vertical Look-At %: Hip
Fields.Description: The lower vertical look-at rate for this joint.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Lower Vertical Look-At %: Shoulder
Fields.Description: The lower vertical look-at rate for this joint.

Fields.Name: Aerial - Lower Vertical Look-At %: WRist
Fields.Description: The lower vertical look-at rate for this joint.

Fields.Name: Priority
Fields.Description: The priority of this row when specified by a TimeAct event.

Fields.Name: Ignore Parent Joint for Look-At %
Fields.Description: If ON, then the child joint (i.e. arm or shoulder) will still adhere to the look-at angle, even if the parent joint (i.e. hip) is not at the target angle yet.

Fields.Name: Maximum Horizontal Rotation: Shooting
Fields.Description: The maximum horizontal angular velocity for all Look-Ats when shooting. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Maximum Vertical Rotation: Shooting
Fields.Description: The maximum vertical angular velocity for all Look-Ats when shooting. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Maximum Horizontal Rotation: Hip
Fields.Description: The maximum horizontal angular velocity for Look-ats for this specified joint. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Maximum Vertical Rotation: Hip
Fields.Description: The maximum vertical angular velocity for Look-ats for this specified joint. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Maximum Horizontal Rotation: Arm
Fields.Description: The maximum horizontal angular velocity for Look-ats for this specified joint. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Maximum Vertical Rotation: Arm
Fields.Description: The maximum vertical angular velocity for Look-ats for this specified joint. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Maximum Horizontal Rotation: Not Shooting
Fields.Description: The maximum horizontal angular velocity for all Look-Ats when not shooting. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Maximum Vertical Rotation: Not Shooting
Fields.Description: The maximum vertical angular velocity for all Look-Ats when not shooting. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Rotation Duration: Grounded
Fields.Description: The duration before releasing the Look-At rotations. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Rotation Duration: Aerial
Fields.Description: The duration before releasing the Look-At rotations. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Duration: Parameter Change
Fields.Description: The duration of the interpolation for the Look-at direction after a Look-at is changed to another.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Duration: Target Switch
Fields.Description: The duration of the interpolation for the Look-at direction after the target is switched.
